pr.title: Record: GatedAttn + ValueResidual + Full QAT + lzma-9 + BigramHash(2048)

output.summary: Turns off gating/value residuals and delays QAT to warmdown so more steps and cleaner TTT fit within 10min/16MB.
techniques: Lean 11L/512d stack with GatedAttention/ValueResidual disabled to save ~1.5 ms per step
Late-stage GPTQ-lite int6 quantization (LATE_QAT_THRESHOLD=0.15, no BANK QAT) to avoid early overhead
Disables SWA, uses EMA at the end, and keeps TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048 to maximize TTT-friendly training budget
